statement: The version control component shows counts of phases, actions, and tasks (read via the builder-tree query as data-only, no builder UI/store import); hovering a count shows a popup listing those items. This is new vs v0.1.4 and carries the 'what's inside' weight under D-5 Option B.

provenance.source: HV-2 sprint execution — proposed and applied 2026-06-30
